name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Obfuscation Character in Commandline
notes:
This Building Block detects possible payload obfuscation via the commandline.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Dosfuscation Character in Commandline
SIGMA Description: Detects possible payload obfuscation via the commandline


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Obfuscation Character in Commandline on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%^^%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%,;,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%comspec:~%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% s^e^t %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% se^t %' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Obfuscation Character in Commandline on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%^^%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%,;,%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%%comspec:~%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% s^e^t %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% se^t %' AQL filter query
